headline: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From Disney’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Disney’s first quarter saw notable momentum, with revenue and non-GAAP profit both surpassing Wall Street’s expectations. Management attributed this outperformance to strength across its streaming platforms, including improvements in Disney+ user experience and double-digit advertising revenue growth. CEO Josh D’Amaro highlighted significant progress within Disney Experiences, noting robust demand for new attractions such as World of Frozen at Disneyland Paris and the launch of the Disney Advent
